data.title: NVIDIA's BioNeMo boosts biomolecular modeling with context parallelism, overcoming memory limits for massive systems. Learn more.
data.description: BioNeMo, a product by NVIDIA, has introduced context parallelism to facilitate biomolecular modeling of large systems. This innovation overcomes GPU memory limitations and enables the processing of massive amounts of data for research and development. This advancement allows for the acceleration of simulations and analyses for various scientific applications.

data.title: RedStone addresses $30B liquidity gap in DeFi lending with new settlement layer, boosting collateral potential. Discover more.
data.description: RedStone has introduced a new settlement layer to tackle the liquidity imbalance for tokenized Real World Assets (RWAs) within Decentralized Finance (DeFi) platforms. This innovation is set to unleash a staggering $30 billion in collateral potential. This development aims to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of DeFi ecosystems by bridging the liquidity gap for RWAs in the tokenized form.

data.title: Illuminate Financial Closes $135m Early Growth Fund to Back the Next Generation of AI & Fintech for Financial Services
data.description: In London on April 29, 2026, Illuminate Financial has successfully completed the closure of its fourth fund, reaching a total of $135 million. This fund has garnered support from eight prominent financial institutions globally, all investing in Enterprise AI and Fintech companies that are instrumental in shaping the future infrastructure of the financial services sector.

data.title: zMaticoo × LIHUHU: Global Casual Game Monetization Growth
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, zMaticoo announced their partnership with LIHUHU, a prominent Vietnamese casual game developer. LIHUHU boasts a substantial user base of over 1.2 million daily active users worldwide, spanning across the US, EU, LATAM, and Southeast Asia. This collaboration aims to enhance LIHUHU's global monetization strategy, expanding their reach from Ho Chi Minh City to international markets.

data.title: Nominations Open for Platts Global Energy Awards 2026
data.description: Nominees are being sought for recognition in 19 categories that honor excellence, innovation, and impact within the industry. S&P Global Energy, a prominent supplier of information, data, analysis, benchmark prices, and workflow solutions, has announced the call for submissions. The nomination process covers a wide array of categories, showcasing achievements within the industry. Nominations for the prestigious awards can be submitted through April 29, 2026, and winners will be selected in various sectors to highlight outstanding contributions.

data.title: INTCO Medical Reports 2025 Results with Resilient Growth, Revenue Reaches Four-Year High as Industry Rebalances
data.description: ZIBO, China, April 29, 2026 – A well-known global producer of disposable gloves, INTCO Medical, recently disclosed its financial performance for 2025. The company generated RMB 9.93 billion in revenue, equivalent to approximately US$1.46 billion, showcasing a 4.23% rise compared to the previous year. This achievement indicates a steady growth trajectory for INTCO, emphasizing its strong position in the market.

data.title: INVT to Showcase AI-Ready Power and Cooling Solutions at DCW Frankfurt 2026
data.description: In Shenzhen, China on April 29, 2026, due to the impact of AI-driven workloads, rising rack densities, and sustainability goals, the European data center market is undergoing significant changes. This evolution is leading to a new phase in infrastructure design that prioritizes efficiency, scalability, and thermal management.

Participants have a chance to compete for a prize pool amounting to 100,000 USDT along with rewards in Apple devices. data.title: Sale of Ontario gold assets completes
data.description: Shareholders of FireFly are set to receive 1 Bellavista share for every 12.8 FireFly shares they own through an in-specie distribution. This distribution will involve Bellavista shares issued to FireFly upon completion.

data.title: In Xi'an, Mayors from Around the World Explore Pathways for Silk Road Cities to Balance Ancient Heritage with Modern Industry
data.description: In Xi'An, China, on April 29, 2026, the 2026 Global Mayors Dialogue•Xi'an began, with participation from mayors across various nations. The event took place in Xi'an, known as the origin of the ancient Silk Road. The theme of the dialogue was "Starting Point of the Ancient Silk Road and Harmonious...".
